import React from 'react'; import DrugSearchForm from '../components/DrugSearchForm'; import './Search.css'; export default function Search() { return (

Drug Interaction Checker

Enter any two drug names to check for known interactions. No account needed — results are instant.

🔴 High Risk

Dangerous interaction that can cause serious harm. Avoid combination or seek immediate medical advice.

🟡 Moderate Risk

Interaction may reduce drug effectiveness or cause side effects. Monitor closely and consult your doctor.

🟢 Low Risk

Minor or no significant interaction detected. Still advisable to inform your healthcare provider.

⚕️ Medical Disclaimer: MediMind is for informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider before making medication decisions.
); }
